_meta.description: Pre-built team compositions for common project types. Use with TeamBuilder.custom() or as --personas list in pm_session.py.

minimal.description: Fastest review for quick decisions. Core PM + adversarial loop only.
minimal.recommended_for: Daily standups, quick feature decisions, hot-fix reviews
minimal.notes: No GTM or leadership. Pure technical review loop.

pm_prompt_review_board.description: PM-led expert review board for prompt quality and execution behavior.
pm_prompt_review_board.recommended_for: Prompt hardening, workflow quality reviews, proactive execution tuning
pm_prompt_review_board.notes: Use before shipping major agent prompt or workflow changes.

sprint_planning.description: Full sprint planning session with engineering depth.
sprint_planning.notes: Includes capacity planning and technical architecture review.

feature_launch.description: Full feature launch readiness — from planning through go-to-market.
feature_launch.recommended_for: Major feature releases, customer-facing milestone launches
feature_launch.notes: Most comprehensive preset. Use for quarterly releases.

security_audit.description: Deep security and compliance review for sensitive features or audit preparation.
security_audit.recommended_for: SOC 2 prep, HIPAA review, penetration test scope, security-sensitive features
security_audit.notes: Focuses on threat modeling, compliance, and chaos engineering.

construction_saas.description: Specialized team for construction technology SaaS products (e.g. BuildBid).
construction_saas.recommended_for: BuildBid, construction estimating tools, field management software, bid management platforms
construction_saas.notes: Tech lead adapted to construction domain (building codes, estimation, BIM). Includes competitive intel for crowded estimating software market.

healthcare_saas.description: Healthcare / health tech SaaS with HIPAA and regulatory focus.
healthcare_saas.recommended_for: EHR integrations, patient portal features, clinical decision support, health data analytics
healthcare_saas.notes: Prioritizes HIPAA compliance, ethical AI review, and accessibility (ADA Section 508).

fintech.description: Financial technology with regulatory, performance, and security depth.
fintech.recommended_for: Payment processing, trading platforms, lending products, financial data APIs
fintech.notes: Tech lead adapted to finance domain (SOX, PCI-DSS, risk models). Chaos engineering covers financial data failure scenarios.

startup_mvp.description: Lean team for MVP validation. Speed over completeness.
startup_mvp.recommended_for: Pre-product-market-fit, first 3 sprints of a new product, pivot evaluation
startup_mvp.notes: Drops GTM depth in favor of speed. CPO acts as final decision maker.

data_ml_platform.description: Data engineering and ML platform build.
data_ml_platform.recommended_for: ML model deployment, data pipeline builds, analytics infrastructure, feature stores
data_ml_platform.notes: Ethical AI review mandatory. Chaos engineering covers data pipeline failure scenarios.

api_platform.description: Public API or developer platform launch.
api_platform.recommended_for: Developer APIs, SDK launches, webhook systems, partner integrations
api_platform.notes: Tech writer is critical — API docs are the product for developers. Performance engineer sets latency SLOs.

accessibility_remediation.description: Focused accessibility audit and remediation sprint.
accessibility_remediation.recommended_for: WCAG compliance sprints, ADA remediation, government contract requirements, Section 508
accessibility_remediation.notes: Accessibility auditor leads. UX designer proposes fixes. QA writes test cases for AT.

enterprise_sales.description: Enterprise deal support — demo readiness and technical validation.
enterprise_sales.recommended_for: Fortune 500 deals, enterprise RFP responses, security reviews for big accounts
enterprise_sales.notes: Skips development phases. Focused entirely on deal support and GTM.

post_incident.recommended_for: Post-mortems, incident prevention, SRE improvement sprints
post_incident.notes: Chaos engineer leads failure mode analysis. DevOps produces runbook improvements.
